data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Role-based compensation rules', but the evidence indicates a gap. Specifically, the pay rates for the roles do not match the expected values; the lead role is set at $300 instead of the expected $150. This discrepancy directly contradicts the requirement, leading to a clear gap in coverage.
gaps: The pay rates for the lead role do not match the expected $150; instead, it is $300.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
